---
title: "Resources"
toc: false
---

# Resources

This section is for practical materials that support the writing and code in the repository.

## Reference documents

Current references include:

- [Context of Use Table](references/ContextOfUse_Table_1page.pdf)
- [Uncertainty Assessment Pedigree Table](references/Uncertainty_Assessment_Pedigree_Table.pdf)
- [Validation Checklist](references/Validation_Checklist.pdf)

These are useful anchors for making claims, reviewing uncertainty, and documenting validation work.

## Planned resource types

This page can grow into a stable landing page for:

- review checklists
- project setup templates
- skill files for specialized tasks
- short implementation notes
- links to example workflows

## Planned near-term additions

- a synthetic data workflow guide
- project structure guidance for regulated analyses
- skill files for reviewing modeling outputs and graphics
